scripts.start:backend: cd backend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.start:ml: cd ml-engine && pip install -r requirements.txt && python main.py
scripts.start:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.blockchain:deploy: cd Blockchain && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost
scripts.init:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
